description: USDJPY regime gate: suppress signals when SPY > 200SMA AND VIX > 15. Removes 50 trades (avg -0.132%, WR 37%) — bull+elevated/fear cluster where JPY safe-haven bids fight USD macro signal.
finding: USDJPY has INVERSE regime personality in bull+elevated VIX — JPY safe-haven bids negate USD rate differential signal. Gate the cluster, keep the pair. Sharpest single improvement since v005.
